name: nebulastreams
description: Hybrid Node.js streaming server with torrent streaming, HTTP proxying, and disk cache

scripts.check:syntax: node --check index.js && node --check config.js && node --check scripts/keepAliveRender.js && node --check services/cacheManager.js && node --check services/httpProxy.js && node --check services/imdbResolver.js && node --check services/reverseProxy.js && node --check services/streamManager.js && node --check services/torrentEngine.js && node --check services/userTracker.js && node --check utils/magnet.js && node --check utils/logger.js
